hero.desc: Transforming complex data into intelligent solutions and stunning visual experiences.
about.title: Tech meets Creativity
about.p1: Hello, nice to meet you! I am a student with a strong interest in continuously growing in the fields of technology and creativity. Currently, I am focused on deepening my role as an AI Engineer, but I also greatly enjoy the creative process through Graphic Design and Videography. For me, every opportunity to learn something new is my way of delivering better and more meaningful work.
about.p2: I strive to bridge the gap between technical functionality and aesthetic excellence — building solutions that are not only smart, but beautiful.

exp.title: Experience
exp.1.title: Graphic Designer & Videographer
exp.1.desc: Creating premium visual identities, cinematic video content, and modern branding solutions for various clients. Specializing in brand storytelling through motion and design.

exp.2.desc: Designing and deploying responsive, high-performance web applications using Vibe Coding, Laravel, Tailwind, and Bootstrap. From database architecture to polished front-end interfaces.

exp.4.desc: Participated in graphic design competitions, creating original visual works under time constraints. Sharpened skills in concept development, typography, and visual communication.

exp.5.desc: Led the school's media division, responsible for managing and curating the official Instagram feed. Oversaw content planning, visual consistency, and post scheduling to grow the school's digital presence.
